subcodes.first_line: Wisdom is the lord of the world and master of nations; it is the first teacher in the school of existence, guiding the seekers [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: خرد سرور عالم و سید اممست اوست معلم اول در دبستان وجود راه نماید و طالبانرا
subcodes.subjects: @high station of learning, @being a source of light; guidance
